claims.claim: Agent App Store With Repro Sandboxes produced positive/supportive evidence in the recorded OMX run.

claims.claim: The recommended next action is: Queue a follow-on only if it targets OS-level sandbox enforcement against real third-party skills; otherwise treat this GB10 toy validation as complete.

limitations: This draft is automatically generated for human review and must be checked before public release.
Claims are limited to the project artifacts listed in the evidence bundle.
External replication and broader hardware/model coverage are TODO unless explicitly present in the artifacts.

Project stop/decision rationale: The harness now preserves the 10/10 valid-skill pass rate and rejects all four adversarial invalid entries with the expected guardrail classes, clearing the bounded experiment goal.
forbidden_global_claims: Do not claim peer review or public validation.
Do not claim results on datasets, hardware, or models not present in artifacts.
Do not hide negative or inconclusive findings.
